name: Cloud & Infrastructure
student_summary: Run the cloud platforms and servers that keep the internet's services alive.
overview: Run the cloud platforms and servers that keep the internet's services alive. Cloud & Infrastructure sits in the Security & Infrastructure family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply cloud architecture to real problems
Collaborate with your team using networking
Keep improving at automation — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Project sites and offices — boots and drawings in the same week
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
Strong earning ceiling (₹55 LPA+ at senior levels)
A broad Security & Infrastructure foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Cloud & Infrastructure is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of networking
projects: Beginner: explore cloud architecture with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using AWS
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward DevOps & Automation: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Cybersecurity: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Software Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Cloud & Infrastructure pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹55 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Computer Science, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech CSE/IT, BCA + cloud certifications. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Cloud & Infrastructure evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Cloud & Infrastructure is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
